description_long: This is a robust, dark metallic plant pot with a cylindrical body and pronounced vertical fluting along its sides, giving it a classical, architectural appearance. The pot features two prominent lion head motifs on opposite sides, each holding a thick metal ring in its mouth, serving as decorative handles. The surface has a weathered, patinated finish, suggesting age and exposure to the elements, with subtle greenish and brownish hues. The rim is thick and slightly rounded, providing structural strength and a bold visual outline. The interior appears deep and spacious, suitable for accommodating soil and a medium-sized plant. The overall design evokes a sense of historical or antique urban decor, often seen in parks or stately gardens.
description: A dark, fluted metal plant pot with lion head ring handles and a weathered, antique finish. The pot is sturdy, decorative, and suitable for medium plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lion head handle prominently on the left and the fluted vertical panels.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting both lion head handles and the full cylindrical shape of the pot.
description_view_2: Side view with the lion head handle on the left, emphasizing the depth and patina of the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view focusing on the right-side lion head handle and the pot's rounded rim.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative planter along urban walkways or in public gardens
attribute_decorative_pattern: vertical fluting with lion head motifs
